FED_TOTAL_ASSETS.label: Federal Reserve total assets
FED_TOTAL_ASSETS.sourceNote: Board of Governors H.4.1 total assets via FRED; converted from millions to billions USD.

RESERVE_BALANCES.label: Reserve balances with Federal Reserve Banks
RESERVE_BALANCES.sourceNote: Board of Governors H.4.1 reserve balances via FRED; converted from millions to billions USD.

TREASURY_GENERAL_ACCOUNT.label: Treasury General Account at the Fed
TREASURY_GENERAL_ACCOUNT.sourceNote: Board of Governors H.4.1 Treasury General Account via FRED; converted from millions to billions USD.

notes: Public Federal Reserve/FRED liquidity lane. No API key required in v0.28.1.
Uses FRED graph CSV with a FRED plain-text data fallback for selected Federal Reserve and New York Fed series.
Balance sheet/TGA/reserve series from H.4.1 are converted from millions to billions USD where needed.
